If the people don be robbed as never before
is time for them to get busy with their representatives in
congress.


In one of his last messages--January 15 1909-Pres-
dent Roosevelt said:


1.-The great corporations are acting with foresight
sngleness of purpose and vgor to control the water pow
ers of the country


Daylight STEALING OF PUBLIC DOMAINS did not
flourish under the Roosevelt regime, and the Ballnger
racket has made 1t unwlse to try it during Tafts term
thus far So the great corporations have decided to try
to egalize the robbery and FOOL THE PEOPLE.


The game is to make the people believe that the states
can the public domain wisely and periodically
than can the federal government


Senator Smoot of Utah is pushing bill which would
grant to the states all water power sites in federal
ownership That is the Smoot scheme is take property
that belongs to all of and turn it to the of
the gangs owned and ruled by the Guggenhes, the Nor
gans the Southern Pacific political caba and their ilk


In the house. Representative Smith of California has
similar BILL while Engebrght of the state has pre-
sented which would subject the lands of the
United States to condemnation under state laws.


The purpose of these is clear IT IS ROB
Berry.


The aim is plainly immunity from federal regulation
and control the putting into the custody of Guggenhem
owned corporaonb bought legislatures property of
future value and necessity which belongs to people
of the whole nation Depletion of the forests coal and
electric power will be about all the power the people of this
nation have.


Are you against this ievery of your present and future
progress? If you write your senators and congress
kill bills 57O4 and 1882 and house bills 1856
and 1882. Write today! Let your representatives
that they going to stand in with robbers they not
going to do it and FOOL YOU.
